# [Product] Upgrade Matches and Match Detail intelligence pages

Labels: `area: product-experience`, `type: feature`, `priority: medium`, `status: ready`
Milestone: `v0.4 Match + Player Intelligence`

## Objective

Turn match list/detail surfaces into match intelligence triage and match
intelligence briefs.

## Context

UPL Lens should not clone official match reports. Match surfaces should
summarize analytical meaning and link out for raw source detail when needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Matches page helps users triage interesting matches.
- [ ] Match Detail reads as an intelligence brief, not a source archive clone.
- [ ] Timeline and source-data caveats remain visible.
- [ ] Frontend build passes.
